title: Will Sakaja's 48-Hour Flood Response Plan Be Implemented Successfully?
description: Nairobi Governor Johnson Sakaja has directed the preparation of a 48-hour action plan to address flooding. Will the plan be implemented successfully and mitigate the impact of the floods?
scenario: Governor Sakaja has ordered a 48-hour flood response plan for Nairobi. Predict the outcome.

outcomes.optionText: Yes, the plan will be successfully implemented and significantly mitigate flooding.
Partial success: The plan will be implemented but only have a limited impact on flooding.
No, the plan will not be implemented effectively or will fail to mitigate flooding.

settlementSource: Official reports from Nairobi City County Government and relevant news outlets.
